title: Regime-conditional model weighting in meta-learner stack
why: Different models suit different regimes — LightGBM for trending, LR for mean-reverting. A flat OOF average ignores this structure. Regime-aware blending could improve calibration and fold Sharpe. Gated on having audit-surviving strategies with real regime labels to learn from.
value_rationale: Regime-conditioned stacking aligns model selection with market state; incremental edge on top of B0053
